title: rate_limits DashMap grows unbounded across sessions
description: check_rate_limit uses or_insert to create entries. disconnect() removes the entry for the last connection. But concurrent GROUP_SEND with 100 members calls check_rate_limit for the sender only; it does not create entries for all group members. The DashMap is bounded by the number of concurrently connected users. This is fine at modest scale but at 10K connected users the map holds 10K entries of (u32, Instant) = ~40 bytes each = ~400 KB. No action needed until larger scale.
